evals.prompt: Import this existing Codex skill into 0langas-skill-center and make it work for Claude Code and Kimi too without duplicating copies.
evals.expected_output: Chooses a canonical top-level skill directory, normalizes cross-client frontmatter, creates provider links, and records docs evidence for discovery claims.

evals.prompt: The Claude version and Kimi version of this skill drifted. Make one canonical tri-client skill and keep provider-specific behavior intact.
evals.expected_output: Diffs provider copies, preserves real behavior, normalizes metadata, and reports conflicts instead of blindly overwriting.

evals.prompt: Rename skill-trigger-helper to skill-trigger-evalsmith and make sure all three providers discover the new name.
evals.expected_output: Renames canonical directory/frontmatter, updates provider links and eval metadata, and verifies discovery paths without overclaiming unsupported docs.
